originContent: Welcome to the Spicetify DJ Info Extension! This extension enhances your Spicetify experience by providing valuable song analysis data for each track, including Key, BPM, Popularity and Year. With this extension, you can gain deeper insights into your music library and discover songs perfectly fitting into your DJ set or Playlist.
translatedContent: Welcome to the Spicetify DJ Info Extension! This extension enhances your Spicetify experience by providing valuable song analysis data for each track, including Key, BPM, Popularity and Year. With this extension, you can gain deeper insights into your music library and discover songs perfectly fitting into your DJ set or Playlist.

originContent: - **Key:** Identify the key of each song in either the standard notation (Dbm) or the Camelot system (3B). The Camelot system simplifies harmonic mixing by categorizing keys into groups that are harmonically compatible. This enables smoother transitions between songs during DJ sets or when creating cohesive playlists.
translatedContent: - **Key:** Identify the key of each song in either the standard notation (Dbm) or the Camelot system (3B). The Camelot system simplifies harmonic mixing by categorizing keys into groups that are harmonically compatible. This enables smoother transitions between songs during DJ sets or when creating cohesive playlists.

originContent: - **BPM ♫ (Beats Per Minute):** Get the tempo of each song, which indicates the speed or pace at which the music is played. BPM is useful for creating playlists with similar speed or for selecting songs for specific activities.
translatedContent: - **BPM ♫ (Beats Per Minute):** Get the tempo of each song, which indicates the speed or pace at which the music is played. BPM is useful for creating playlists with similar speed or for selecting songs for specific activities.

originContent: - **Popularity ♥:** Discover how popular your songs are by accessing their popularity ratings. This data can be helpful in understanding the overall reception and popularity of a track.
translatedContent: - **Popularity ♥:** Discover how popular your songs are by accessing their popularity ratings. This data can be helpful in understanding the overall reception and popularity of a track.

originContent: - **Year:** Find out when your songs were released. This data can be useful for creating playlists with songs from a specific time period.
translatedContent: - **Year:** Find out when your songs were released. This data can be useful for creating playlists with songs from a specific time period.

translatedContent: After putting the extension file into the correct folder, run the following command to install the extension:

originContent: Or you can manually edit your `config-xpui.ini` file. Add your desired extension filenames in the extensions key, separated them by the | character.
translatedContent: Or you can manually edit your `config-xpui.ini` file. Add your desired extension filenames in the extensions key, separated by the | character.

originContent: Run the following command to uninstall the extension (note the - on the end):
translatedContent: Run the following command to uninstall the extension (note the - on the end):

originContent: You can also manually edit your `config-xpui.ini` file. Just remove the extensions' filename completely.
translatedContent: You can also manually edit your `config-xpui.ini` file. Just remove the extensions' filename completely.

originContent: You have the option to toggle the visibility of DJ information in the extension. By default, DJ information such as Key, BPM, Popularity, and Year are displayed for each song and also next to the currently playing song. However, if you prefer a cleaner interface, you can easily hide these separately.
translatedContent: You have the option to toggle the visibility of DJ information in the extension. By default, DJ information such as Key, BPM, Popularity, and Year are displayed for each song and also next to the currently playing song. However, if you prefer a cleaner interface, you can easily hide these separately.

originContent: To toggle the visibility of DJ information, follow these steps:
translatedContent: To toggle the visibility of DJ information, follow these steps:

originContent: 2. Locate the menu icon on the top-right corner of the interface (your profile picture) and click on the icon
translatedContent: 2. Locate the menu icon on the top-right corner of the interface (your profile picture) and click on the icon

originContent: 3. In the menu, find the option 'DJ Info'
translatedContent: 3. In the menu, find the option 'DJ Info'

originContent: 4. In the sub-menu click on the toggle switch to hide or show whatever you want
translatedContent: 4. In the sub-menu click on the toggle switch to hide or show whatever you want

originContent: 5. Click on Apply Changes to make your settings visible
translatedContent: 5. Click on Apply Changes to make your settings visible

originContent: - Added new options for new audio features
translatedContent: - Added new options for new audio features

originContent: - Fixed layout with new mix UI
translatedContent: - Fixed layout with new mix UI

originContent: - Fixed the api breaking the extension
translatedContent: - Fixed the api breaking the extension

originContent: - Removed Danceability and Energy because they are not available in the new api
translatedContent: - Removed Danceability and Energy because they are not available in the new api

originContent: - Added a new UI for the DJ Info and improved the old version, which can still be used by disabling the rich ui
translatedContent: - Added a new UI for the DJ Info and improved the old version, which can still be used by disabling the rich ui

originContent: - Fixed Caching and migrated to a new system which uses IndexedDB instead of LocalStorage
translatedContent: - Fixed Caching and migrated to a new system which uses IndexedDB instead of LocalStorage

originContent: - The new Camelot Key colors can be customized by overwriting the css variables
translatedContent: - The new Camelot Key colors can be customized by overwriting the css variables

originContent: - Now finally works correctly in recommendations
translatedContent: - Now finally works correctly in recommendations

originContent: - Data is fetched in batches, fixing missing data because of rate limits
translatedContent: - Data is fetched in batches, fixing missing data because of rate limits

originContent: - Working again with new Playlist UI
translatedContent: - Working again with new Playlist UI

originContent: - Fixed the styles in the recommended songs section
translatedContent: - Fixed the styles in the recommended songs section

originContent: - Added the option to see DJ info in the recommended songs section
translatedContent: - Added the option to see DJ info in the recommended songs section

originContent: - Fixed a bug where the DJ info would not show up in the Discography section ([#2](https://github.com/L3-N0X/spicetify-dj-info/issues/2))
translatedContent: - Fixed a bug where the DJ info would not show up in the Discography section ([#2](https://github.com/L3-N0X/spicetify-dj-info/issues/2))

originContent: - Fixed a bug in the queue ([#9](https://github.com/L3-N0X/spicetify-dj-info/issues/9))
translatedContent: - Fixed a bug in the queue ([#9](https://github.com/L3-N0X/spicetify-dj-info/issues/9))

originContent: - Improved performance with storing data locally to speed up loading time and reduce API calls
translatedContent: - Improved performance with storing data locally to speed up loading time and reduce API calls

originContent: - Reworked the Settings menu to toggle the visibility of DJ information much easier
translatedContent: - Reworked the Settings menu to toggle the visibility of DJ information much easier

originContent: - Added the option to toggle Year, Popularity, Danceability and Key in the standard notation
translatedContent: - Added the option to toggle Year, Popularity, Danceability and Key in the standard notation

originContent: A big shoutout to [obafgkmdh](https://github.com/obafgkmdh) and [FixeQD](https://github.com/FixeQD) for fixing the extension after the internal api broke and migrating the whole api to the internal protobuf based api and also for adding a better file structure with bundling!
translatedContent: A big shoutout to [obafgkmdh](https://github.com/obafgkmdh) and [FixeQD](https://github.com/FixeQD) for fixing the extension after the internal api broke and migrating the whole api to the internal protobuf based api and also for adding a better file structure with bundling!

originContent: And also thanks to [Golevka2001](https://github.com/Golevka2001) for the idea for better alignment of the DJ info in the playlist!
translatedContent: And also thanks to [Golevka2001](https://github.com/Golevka2001) for the idea for better alignment of the DJ info in the playlist!

originContent: Big thanks to [duffey](https://github.com/Tetrax-10) for the main code of displaying something in the playlist and the now playing widget!
translatedContent: Big thanks to [duffey](https://github.com/Tetrax-10) for the main code of displaying something in the playlist and the now playing widget!

originContent: Also thanks to [je09](https://github.com/je09) for contributing the code for displaying both the standard notation and the Camelot system for the key aswell as the option to display it on the left side in now playing!
translatedContent: Also thanks to [je09](https://github.com/je09) for contributing the code for displaying both the standard notation and the Camelot system for the key aswell as the option to display it on the left side in now playing!

originContent: If you encounter any issues or have suggestions for improving this extension, feel free to open an issue in the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/L3-N0X/spicetify-dj-info). Contributions are also welcome! Fork the repository, make your changes, and submit a pull request with your improvements.
translatedContent: If you encounter any issues or have suggestions for improving this extension, feel free to open an issue in the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/L3-N0X/spicetify-dj-info). Contributions are also welcome! Fork the repository, make your changes, and submit a pull request with your improvements.

originContent: Enjoy the enhanced music analysis experience with the Spicetify DJ Info Extension! If you find this extension useful, consider giving it a ⭐️ on GitHub. Thank you for using DJ Info!
translatedContent: Enjoy the enhanced music analysis experience with the Spicetify DJ Info Extension! If you find this extension useful, consider giving it a ⭐️ on GitHub. Thank you for using DJ Info!
